:::: {.card .mb-4 .custom-card}
::: {.card-body}
**Journal Paper** - Journal Name Year

Your Name, & Co-author (20XX). *Your paper title*. Journal Name, Volume(Issue), pages. https://doi.org/10.xxxx/xxxxx

::: {.d-flex .justify-content-end}
[<i class="bi bi-journal-bookmark-fill"></i> Journal Webpage](https://journal.example.com/article){.btn .btn-outline-primary .mx-1}
[<i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf"></i> PDF](/files/your-paper.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-primary .mx-1}
:::
:::
::::
